page_metadata.biotools__summary: A novel likelihood-based method for genetic association with NGS data from external control groups. The tool substitutes genotype calls by their expected values given observed sequence data and implements a robust variance estimate for the score statistic.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A novel likelihood-based method for genetic association with NGS data from external control groups. The tool substitutes genotype calls by their expected values given observed sequence data and implements a robust variance estimate for the score statistic.
